authors: Kayo Mimizuka Katlyn Glover Inga K. Trauthig Samuel C. Woolley
raw_title: “I Don’t Even Watch News (Voluntarily) on WeChat” – Socially-Compelled Exposure to Misinformation Among U.S. Diaspora Communities
title_en: “I Don’t Even Watch News (Voluntarily) on WeChat” – Socially-Compelled Exposure to Misinformation Among U.S. Diaspora Communities
title_zh: “我甚至（自愿地）不在微信上看新闻”——美国侨民社区中社会性被迫接触错误信息
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了美国侨民社区成员如何通过微信等社交媒体平台，在社会压力下被迫接触错误信息，即使他们并不主动寻求新闻。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how members of U.S. diaspora communities are socially compelled to encounter misinformation through platforms like WeChat, even when they don't actively seek news.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代中，社交媒体如何通过社会网络压力影响侨民社区的信息接触行为，特别是非自愿的错误信息传播。
research_direction_en: Investigating how social media platforms influence information exposure in diaspora communities through social network pressures in the digital age, particularly regarding involuntary misinformation dissemination.
